title: Brokecraft: The Mod
description: The mod that breaks Minecraft in the best way possible!
body:
It's finally here, the long awaited Brokecraft: the Mod!

This malfunctioning mod contains:

27 new achievements!
2 new armor sets: The Shadow Kirb armor and the Afap Armor, with more on the way!

4 new biomes, including The Afap Biome, and others detailed in the Dimensions thingy below, plus two that would not generate properly and are available through commands!

52 new blocks, including an Afap plushie, Ghostwood, Purplewood, Locked doors (currently creative only), among others!

3 new dimensions: The Harshlands, a High risk, high reward dimension filled with Creepers that can be accessed by building a portal of Compressed Diamond Blocks, The Blue Dimension, which is a lapis filled landscape obtained by building a Lapis portal, and the Dark Dimension, an (incredibly WIP) barren wasteland, obtained by building a soul stone portal.

56 new items, including a (very WIP) special questline

34 new entities, including 14-ish different Kirbies, Evil tubas and more!

9 new bosses including nonsense like a pencil and a giant Afap head, as well as multiple threats of Dream Land!

2 new paintings

8 new ranged weapons, including a Beam Staff, a Frisbee, and elemental abilities, among others!

98 new recipes (if you're into that sort of thing)

3 new structures, like a Villager hotel, or a Skyblock, as well as a fourth one that is just broken.

A new tool tier

2 new villager professions!

What're you still doing here? Go check it out!


(Credits:	HAL Labs for the idea of Kirbies, Purple Shep for Purple Shep, BlueBoyBuilds, KhakkiKittyKayaks, Greief, DanTDM for Trayuras, Artifacts Mod for the idea of the Parasol, and you, the reader.)
